headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -42.7)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 216% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 134 quotes and 107 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• This frustration level sits in the upper third of the 61-day range, showing elevated but not extreme discontent.

• Optimism rebounded strongly from yesterday's deep negative while fears improved moderately but remain subdued.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
